hero.title: Lightning Payments

coming.description: Lightning payments will be available in a future update. Stay tuned for instant Bitcoin transactions!

settlements.description: Settle payments in milliseconds with low fees

multicurrency.description: Support for Bitcoin, sats, and other Lightning currencies

invoice.description: Create and share payment invoices with custom amounts

routing.description: Automatic routing through the Lightning Network for optimal fees

backup.description: Secure backup and recovery options for your Lightning wallet
